title: iberis pruitii subsp. lagascana
intro: Iberis pruitii subsp. lagascana, also known as rock-cress or alpine rock-cress, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is rich in vitamins and minerals, providing various health benefits such as antioxidant activity, immune system support, and potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Iberis pruitii subsp. lagascana can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and digestive problems.
